identity.mission: Create a 'RESOLINE TECHBIS' - a digital workspace that feels like a high-end physical office. Fusion of Swiss Precision (Typography) and Soft Utility (Layout).
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Enterprise density with Consumer app fluidity.
Emotion First: Trust and Efficiency. Every pixel must feel 'stable'.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all financial/time data.
Negative Space: Use 'p-6' or 'p-8' inside cards. Don't cram.
Contrast: High contrast text for readability. No gray-on-gray text.

headings.usage: Page titles, Card headers, Modal titles. Tracking-tight.

body.usage: General text, form labels, table content.

data.usage: Salaries, Dates, Employee IDs, Attendance Hours.

rules: Overlines (e.g., 'EMPLOYEE ID') must be Uppercase + text-xs + tracking-widest.
Line height: leading-none for headings, leading-relaxed for body.

colors.theme_strategy: Professional Light Mode with 'Deep Space' Dark Mode Toggle
usage_rules: Primary color is for Actions (Buttons, Links) and Active States only.
Status Colors: Success = Emerald (#10B981), Warning = Amber (#F59E0B), Error = Rose (#F43F5E).
Gradients: Use subtle 'mesh' gradients for the Sidebar background only, never for buttons.

rules: Main Chart: col-span-2 row-span-2 or col-span-3
Every pixel utilized. Use h-full on children.

spacing.philosophy: Generous internal padding (p-6) for cards to prevent 'spreadsheet look'.

style_guide.shadows: shadow-sm (Subtle) for cards. shadow-md for dropdowns.
style_guide.borders: 1px solid border-border. No borderless cards in this Enterprise context.

customization_instructions: Buttons: Use h-10 px-4 py-2. Font-medium. No pill shapes.
Inputs: Background-white (light mode). Border-input. Focus: ring-2 ring-primary/20.
Tables: Use 'compact' density. Row height 48px. Header text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground.
Sidebar: Fixed left. Width 256px. Glassmorphism effect (bg-background/95 backdrop-blur-sm) border-r.
Avatars: Square with rounded-md (not full circle) for a modern tech feel.

visual_enhancers.empty_states: Use ASCII art or minimal SVG icons for empty states. No generic illustrations.

login_background.description: Minimalist Macbook on white table. Clean, professional start.

dashboard_empty.description: Yellow penny board. Playful touch for 'No Data Yet'.

rules: Focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.
ARIA: Use aria-label for icon-only buttons.
Testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Use specific icons: 'LayoutDashboard', 'Users', 'Calendar', 'FileText', 'CreditCard', 'Settings'.
2. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar and Header structure.
3. Use 'recharts' for the Dashboard analytics (Attendance, Leave trends).
4. Implement Dark Mode using the 'next-themes' or custom context approach (Tailwind 'dark' class).
5. For the Employee Table, use '@tanstack/react-table' (if available) or standard Shadcn Table.
6. CRITICAL: Do not use 'Inter' for Headings. Import 'Manrope' from Google Fonts.
7. Ensure the 'Login' page is split 50/50: Left side Form, Right side Image (login_background).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
